---
tags:
  - ricing
---
A screen suspension daemon that creates lock screens.
# Configuration
Configure in ~/.config/hypr/hyprlock.conf
### My Config
```conf
# /* ---- 💫 https://github.com/JaKooLit 💫 ---- */  #
# Hyprlock                                                          
# Original config submitted by https://github.com/SherLock707

# Sourcing colors generated by wallust
source = $HOME/.config/hypr/wallust/wallust-hyprland.conf
$Scripts = $HOME/.config/hypr/scripts



background {
    monitor = DP-3
  	#path = screenshot   # screenshot of your desktop
	  path = $HOME/.config/hypr/wallpaper_effects/output-0.png # NOTE only png supported for now
    #color = $color7

    # all these options are taken from hyprland, see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/#blur for explanations
    blur_passes = 0 # 0 disables blurring
    noise = 0.0117
    contrast = 1.3000 # Vibrant!!!
    brightness = 0.8000
    vibrancy = 0.2100
    vibrancy_darkness = 0.0
}
background {
    monitor = DVI-D-1
	  #path = screenshot   # screenshot of your desktop
	  path = $HOME/.config/hypr/wallpaper_effects/output-1.png # NOTE only png supported for now
    #color = $color7

    # all these options are taken from hyprland, see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/#blur for explanations
    blur_passes = 0 # 0 disables blurring
    noise = 0.0117
    contrast = 1.3000 # Vibrant!!!
    brightness = 0.8000
    vibrancy = 0.2100
    vibrancy_darkness = 0.0
}

# User
label {
    monitor = DVI-D-1
    text =    $USER
    color = $color12
    font_size = 55
    font_family = Inter Display Medium

    position = 0, 500
    halign = center
    valign = bottom
}

input-field {
    monitor = DVI-D-1
    size = 300, 50
    outline_thickness = 3
    dots_size = 0.33 # Scale of input-field height, 0.2 - 0.8
    dots_spacing = 0.15 # Scale of dots' absolute size, 0.0 - 1.0
    dots_center = true
    outer_color = $color5
    inner_color = $color0
    font_color = $color12
    fade_on_empty = true
    placeholder_text = <i>Password...</i> # Text rendered in the input box when it's empty.
    hide_input = false
    
    position = 0, 420
    halign = center
    valign = bottom
}

# Date
label {
    monitor = DVI-D-1
    text = cmd[update:18000000] echo "<b> "$(date +'%A, %-d %B %Y')" </b>"
    color = $color12
    font_size = 45
    font_family = JetBrains Mono Nerd Font Mono ExtraBold
    position = 0, -100
    halign = center
    valign = top
}




# uptime
label {
    monitor = DP-3
    text = cmd[update:60000] echo "<b> "$(uptime -p || $Scripts/UptimeNixOS.sh)" </b>"
    color = $color12
    font_size = 24
    font_family = JetBrains Mono Nerd Font Mono ExtraBold
    position = 0, 0
    halign = right
    valign = bottom
}

# weather edit the scripts for locations
# weather scripts are located in ~/.config/hypr/UserScripts Weather.sh and/or Weather.py
# see https://github.com/JaKooLit/Hyprland-Dots/wiki/TIPS#%EF%B8%8F-weather-app-related-for-waybar-and-hyprlock
label {
    monitor = DP-3
    text = cmd[update:3600000] [ -f ~/.cache/.weather_cache ] && cat  ~/.cache/.weather_cache
    color = $color12
    font_size = 24
    font_family = JetBrains Mono Nerd Font Mono ExtraBold
    position = 50, 0
    halign = left
    valign = bottom
}
```

# Logging
`hyprlock -v &> hyprlock_log.txt`
and then `cat hyprlock_log.txt` afterwards
